parsedJson.summary: The website uses a standard, functional layout with a generic stock photo and a heavy visual overlay that obscures the service being offered, making it feel like a template rather than a specialized local business.

issues.title: Hero image obscured by dark overlay
issues.what_observed: The main hero image (a house with a roof) is covered by a heavy, dark blue/black gradient overlay that makes the photo look dim and indistinct.
issues.why_problem: Customers searching for roof restoration want to see *results*. By darkening the image, the site hides the quality of the work. It feels like a generic template rather than a showcase of real work. It creates a 'mood' rather than demonstrating competence.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A bright, high-contrast photo of a finished roof restoration with no dark overlay, or a very subtle gradient only at the bottom to ensure text readability.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the dark overlay. Use a high-quality, bright photo of a completed roof restoration. Ensure the text is legible by using a drop shadow or a semi-transparent white text box, rather than darkening the whole image.
issues.plain_explanation: 您的主页背景图被一层深色滤镜盖住了，导致原本漂亮的屋顶照片看起来很暗，看不清细节。
issues.customer_impact: 客户在搜索屋顶服务时，第一反应是看“效果”。图片太暗会让客户觉得您的工作成果不明显，或者网站看起来像是一个通用的模板，而不是专业的屋顶公司。这可能导致客户在 3 秒内离开，去寻找那些展示清晰、明亮案例的竞争对手。

issues.title: Generic stock photo instead of real work
issues.what_observed: The hero image appears to be a generic stock photo of a suburban house, not a specific project completed by Roofshield in Brisbane.
issues.why_problem: Local customers want to see work done in *their* area. A stock photo feels impersonal and untrustworthy. It doesn't prove the business has the capability to handle local roof types (e.g., specific tile or metal common in Brisbane).
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A real photo of a roof restoration project completed by the business, ideally with recognizable Brisbane architecture or landmarks, or a photo of the team at work.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the stock photo with a high-resolution, real photo of a recent roof restoration project in Brisbane. Add a caption or badge saying 'Restored in [Suburb Name]' to build local relevance.
issues.plain_explanation: 主页使用的是一张通用的网络图片，而不是您实际完成的屋顶修复案例。这让网站看起来缺乏真实感。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户更信任那些展示真实案例的公司。使用通用图片会让客户怀疑您的实际经验。研究表明，展示真实客户案例可以将转化率提高 20-30%，因为客户能看到“别人家”的效果，从而建立信任。

issues.title: Cluttered navigation with too many links
issues.what_observed: The top navigation bar has 6 main links plus a dropdown, plus a secondary row of 4 links below it. This creates a 'menu overload'.
issues.why_problem: A customer searching 'roofing Brisbane' has a specific intent: get a quote or call. They don't want to browse 'Case studies' or 'Gallery' immediately. Too many choices cause decision paralysis. The 'Get Your Free Quote' button is also buried in the nav, not prominent enough.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simplified navigation with 3-4 key links (Services, About, Contact) and a prominent, high-contrast 'Get a Quote' or 'Call Now' button in the top right.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the top navigation to 3-4 essential links. Move 'Case studies' and 'Gallery' to the footer or a secondary menu. Make the 'Get Your Free Quote' button a distinct, high-contrast element (e.g., red or orange) in the top right corner, separate from the nav links.
issues.plain_explanation: 顶部的导航栏链接太多，让客户不知道该点哪里。对于急需屋顶服务的客户来说，他们只想快速找到联系方式或报价按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 过多的导航选项会让客户感到困惑，增加跳出率。简化导航并突出“获取报价”按钮，可以直接引导客户采取行动，预计可提高 15-20% 的咨询转化率。

issues.title: Call-to-action buttons lack visual hierarchy
issues.what_observed: The two buttons in the hero section ('Call Us Today' and 'Get Your Free Quote') are identical in style (white outline, same size).
issues.why_problem: When two buttons look the same, the user doesn't know which one is the primary action. This dilutes the conversion focus. One action (usually 'Get Quote') should be visually dominant to guide the user.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One primary button (e.g., 'Get Your Free Quote') filled with a bold color (red/orange) and one secondary button (e.g., 'Call Us') as an outline or text link.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make 'Get Your Free Quote' a solid, high-contrast button (matching the brand red). Make 'Call Us Today' a secondary outline button or a simple text link with a phone icon. This creates a clear visual path for the user.
issues.plain_explanation: 两个行动按钮（“致电”和“获取报价”）看起来完全一样，没有主次之分。客户不知道应该优先点击哪一个。
issues.customer_impact: 缺乏视觉层级的按钮会让客户犹豫，降低点击率。突出主要行动按钮（如“获取报价”）可以引导客户完成转化，预计可提高 10-15% 的按钮点击率。

positive_observations: The logo is clear and professional, with a recognizable brand mark.
The headline text is large and legible, clearly stating the service.
The color scheme (red, white, dark blue) is appropriate for the roofing industry and conveys trust.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace the dark, generic hero image with a bright, real photo of a completed roof restoration in Brisbane.
2. Simplify the navigation and make the 'Get Your Free Quote' button the most prominent element on the page.
3. Establish a clear visual hierarchy for the call-to-action buttons (primary vs. secondary).
